title: Hierarchical Process Rewards for Efficient agentic RAG

defines.name: HiPRAG
defines.definition: A hierarchical process-reward training framework for agentic RAG that gives step-level feedback on search decisions to improve both answer quality and retrieval efficiency.

problem: Current agentic RAG training relies too much on coarse outcome rewards and fails to provide fine-grained control over redundant or missing search decisions, leading to inefficient and unreliable retrieval behavior.
